ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO country code */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the country */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gdp_data" (
  "gdp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GDP record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the GDP data */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita value for the year */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* GDP growth rate for the year */,
  "gdp_per_capita_ppp" REAL /* GDP per capita in purchasing power parity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gdp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gdp_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "life_satisfaction_data" (
  "satisfaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each life satisfaction record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the life satisfaction data */,
  "life_satisfaction" REAL /* Life satisfaction score for the year */,
  "satisfaction_survey_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the life satisfaction data */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size of the survey */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the life satisfaction score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("satisfaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_life_satisfaction_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "urban_population_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population living in urban areas */,
  "age_structure" TEXT /* Age structure of the population */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "population_growth_rate" REAL /* Population growth rate of the country */,
  "urbanization_rate" REAL /* Urbanization rate of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the indicator data */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the indicator */,
  "indicator_description" TEXT /* Description of the economic indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the indicator */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (GDP, satisfaction) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "data_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the data included in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (PDF, Excel, etc.) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of times the report has been viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to access the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (government, international organization, etc.) */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of updates to the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
